requirement: [Memory Allocation] Gracefully handle allocation requests exceeding available VRAM

test_cases.description: Verify that the system gracefully handles memory allocation requests that exceed available VRAM
preconditions: GPU driver is installed and operational
steps: Attempt to allocate memory exceeding available VRAM
Check for error messages or warnings
Verify that the system does not crash
test_cases.expected_result: The system should handle the allocation request gracefully without crashing and provide appropriate feedback to the user

test_cases.description: Evaluate performance when handling memory allocation requests that exceed available VRAM
preconditions: GPU driver is installed and operational
steps: Repeatedly allocate memory exceeding available VRAM
Measure the time taken for each allocation
Monitor system resources during the process
test_cases.expected_result: The system should handle the allocation requests efficiently even when exceeding available VRAM

test_cases.description: Test the system's behavior when marginally exceeding available VRAM for memory allocation
preconditions: GPU driver is installed and operational
steps: Allocate memory slightly exceeding available VRAM
test_cases.expected_result: The system should handle the edge case gracefully without significant performance degradation or errors

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation behavior when integrated with different GPU hardware configurations
preconditions: GPU driver is installed and operational
steps: Allocate memory exceeding available VRAM on different GPU configurations
Compare the behavior across different setups
Ensure consistency in handling allocation requests
test_cases.expected_result: The memory allocation behavior should be consistent across different GPU configurations

test_cases.description: Ensure that the system continues to handle memory allocation requests exceeding available VRAM after software updates
preconditions: GPU driver is updated to the latest version
steps: Allocate memory exceeding available VRAM after updating the GPU driver
Verify that the behavior remains consistent
Check for any regression in handling allocation requests
test_cases.expected_result: The system should continue to handle allocation requests gracefully even after software updates
